task_completion.description: Open Jolly Lobby Track and access the Badge Designer
task_completion.visual_evidence: The Jolly Lobby Track application window is open, specifically showing the badge design canvas or template editor.

task_completion.description: Add the header 'CONTRACTOR' to the badge
task_completion.visual_evidence: A text element containing the word 'CONTRACTOR' is clearly visible on the badge design canvas.

task_completion.description: Add a Visitor Name data field
task_completion.visual_evidence: A data field or text element representing the visitor's name (e.g., 'Name' or 'Visitor Name') is visible on the badge canvas.
A data field or text element representing the company (e.g., 'Company') is visible on the badge canvas.

task_completion.description: Add a Visit Date data field
task_completion.visual_evidence: A data field or text element representing the visit date (e.g., 'Date' or 'Time') is visible on the badge canvas.
A 'Save As' dialog is visible with 'Contractor_Badge' entered in the file name field, or the main application window title bar displays 'Contractor_Badge' indicating the file was saved.

integrity.description: The agent used the Jolly Lobby Track GUI to design the badge
integrity.visual_evidence: Screenshots show interaction with the Jolly Lobby Track interface (menus, toolbars, canvas) rather than terminal commands creating or modifying files.

integrity.description: The agent used the correct application, not a generic image or text editor
integrity.visual_evidence: The application window clearly belongs to Jolly Lobby Track (check window title and specific UI elements), not a tool like GIMP, Paint, or a text editor.

integrity.description: The file was saved using the application's built-in save functionality
integrity.visual_evidence: The standard Windows/Wine save dialog is used within the Lobby Track application context to save the file.

privileged_info_for_vlm: The badge template must be saved with the exact filename stem 'Contractor_Badge'. The badge canvas must visually include the text 'CONTRACTOR' (as a header), and fields for 'Name', 'Company', and 'Date' (or 'Time'). Valid save locations include the default Lobby Track template folders or /home/ga/Documents.
